prompt: Create a photorealistic candid 35mm disposable-film style street portrait of a cute young woman in a Japanese navy-and-white sailor school uniform cosplay with a short-sleeve white blouse, navy sailor collar with white stripes, navy ribbon bow, and navy pleated mini skirt standing shyly outside a small neighborhood cafe on a sunny Japanese residential street. She is centered full-body from mid-thigh up, holding both hands together in front of her while gripping the light gray handles of a dark navy school bag at the bottom edge of the frame. Her medium-length brown hair, softly messy and half tied back with loose strands catches warm sunlight, and her face is covered by a large soft square blur/mosaic for privacy. The setting includes a narrow asphalt street on the left with a red-tinted road lane, curb, utility pole, low concrete walls, houses, plants, and bright summer greenery; on the right is a cozy cafe entrance with wooden glass doors, a wooden chair, potted shrubs, a service window, cups and cafe objects visible inside, and warm interior lights. Use natural daylight, gentle shadows, warm nostalgic color grading, slight film grain, realistic skin and fabric texture, casual snapshot composition, vertical 4:5 framing, shallow-to-medium depth of field, and an authentic Fujifilm disposable camera look. No text, no watermark, no extra people as main subjects.
